name: Slime planet
description:
You’re trapped on an alien planet filled with slimes! Do whatever you want!

Well… I know there’s a fetish for slime inflation… so… go wild if that’s what you want… weirdo…

By the way, this bot will probably not work/be bad since I am a very lazy person!

I decided to make it limitless since I know some of the people on this website are freaks.

I also am not going to test it, though if it breaks just post in the comments and I’ll attempt to fix it.
creator: Sig Bre
